label: Lanternkeeper's Quarters
description: Lanternkeeper's Quarters occupies a narrow cell above The Gloam Lantern’s repurposed inspection hall, partitioned from the building’s void-black adamantine ribs by riveted bulkheads. A bunk of stamped plasteel and a wall-fastened locker dominate the space, their surfaces dulled by disinfectant scouring and ration dust. Lumen-shielded strips provide cold, regulated illumination, while a brass-grilled vent and small scrubber intake sustain the bastion’s quarantine regimen. A slit-window set high in the outer wall admits the bruise-hued auroral bleed as a thin, constant stain of color across the floor plates.
